evidence.title: Chemistry: Atoms First 2e
evidence.locator: Occurrence, Preparation, and Compounds of Oxygen
evidence.usage: Representative normal oxide, peroxide, superoxide, and covalent oxide outcomes

premises.statement: The listed element families have the representative balanced oxygen outcomes encoded by their supported cases.
Oxygen and oxide products use explicit localized or delocalized bonds, formal charges, ionic components, and representative network fragments.
The listed electron states are the closed valence domain used by the oxygen reaction operations.
Formation of the oxide product and disappearance of the reactant are compatible generic observations for these representative theoretical experiences.

applicability.required_context: representative theoretical oxidation outcome selected by the reviewed oxygen catalogue
